contract.matching_policy: C1-retained task/family/concept identities matched into the declared task-start baseline; baseline-only identities ignored
contract.weighting: equal paired concepts within family, equal families within task, equal retained tasks overall

label: EXPLORATORY STAGE-EMERGENCE COMPARISON: exact-rank association change from C0M to C1, not causal evidence
limitations: This is an exploratory stage-emergence comparison, not a causal intervention.
Minimum rank over forms and layers is an optimistic associative readout.
Complete-case metrics exclude retained concepts unscorable at either checkpoint.

ratio_confidence_interval.derived_from: paired task bootstrap of C1-minus-C0 mean log rank
paired task bootstrap of C1-minus-C0 mean log rank
paired task bootstrap of C1-minus-C0 mean log rank

native_minus_logit.estimand: (C1 minus baseline) left-method change minus (C1 minus baseline) right-method change

native_minus_public.estimand: (C1 minus baseline) left-method change minus (C1 minus baseline) right-method change

public_minus_logit.estimand: (C1 minus baseline) left-method change minus (C1 minus baseline) right-method change
